name: World Legacy Scars
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>遺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>が<ruby lang="jp"><rb>刻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きざ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>む<ruby lang="jp"><rb>傷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きず</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>痕</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あと</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Scars Left by the Star Relic
desc: All "Mekk-Knight" monsters on the field gain 300 ATK/DEF. Once per turn: You can discard 1 "Mekk-Knight" monster or 1 "World Legacy" card; draw 1 card. You can banish 8 "Mekk-Knight" monsters with different names from your GY and/or face-up from your field; send your opponent's entire hand and Extra Deck to the GY.
eff: All "Mekk-Knight" monsters on the field gain 300 ATK/DEF. Once per turn: You can discard 1 "Mekk-Knight" monster or 1 "World Legacy" card; draw 1 card. You can banish 8 "Mekk-Knight" monsters with different names from your GY and/or face-up from your field; send your opponent's entire hand and Extra Deck to the GY.

sets.set: Extreme Force Sneak Peek Participation Card

action: Sends from your opponent's hand to your opponent's Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's Extra Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
